title: Bygone Nether
description: Explore new structures unique to each Nether biome, as well as the new mobs that inhabit them.
body:
## 📖 About: > *A Nether structure mod for Minecraft 1.16.5+ aiming to advance the lore behind the nether dimension, as well as provide additional challenges and compelling gameplay in the survival game mode.* Explore new structures unique to each Nether biome, as well as the new mobs that inhabit them. Includes a redesign to fortresses and addition of Bastion Remnants to the Basalt Deltas. See the Images Tab for Spoilers! Listen to the soundtrack on [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/izofar). This is my first mod in release. Check out my others, and keep an eye out for more!. **Please considering supporting me below, as that will allow me more time for updates and fixes.** ## 🎥 Videos:

## Dependencies: * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html) * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.19.2.html) * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.18.2.html) * [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.16.5.html) * No other mod dependencies! ## 🍳 Recipes:

## 📦 Integrations with other mods: Visit the [Bygone Nether page on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-nether) for the full integration list! ## ✔️ Fixes to Old Issues: > tldr: update Bygone Nether and Forge! Visit the [Bygone Nether page on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bygone-nether) for an extensive list of fix recommendations! ## Acknowledgements: Special Thanks to: Telepathic Grunt, Sizable Shrimp, Commoble, and Cadiboo from the Mod Development Discord for their assistance and direction during the development process.
